description.en: Takes the logging configuration from a dictionary. The contents of this dictionary are described in Configuration dictionary schema below. If an error is encountered during configuration, this function will raise a ValueError, TypeError, AttributeError or ImportError with a suitably descriptive message. The following is a (possibly incomplete) list of conditions which will raise an error: A level which is not a string or which is a string not corresponding to an actual logging level. A propag...
